text: Machine learning is a way for computers to learn from data. One common method is supervised learning. In this approach, the computer is given a set of training data, which includes examples with known answers. For example, it might see many pictures of cats and dogs, each one labelled correctly. The computer uses this information to build a model. This model is like a set of rules that helps it make predictions about new, unseen pictures. After training, we test the model to see how accurate it is. The goal is to improve its accuracy so it can reliably recognise cats and dogs in the future.
